description: Metric-specific external benchmark gaps. Fixture loading and execution remain strict; only the named metric mismatch is reported as expected unresolved. A named metric that passes, is missing, or belongs to a missing fixture is a stale-entry failure. Paths are relative to tests/golden/data/.

metrics.reason: Tree risk parity must be aligned before the option-adjusted DV01 can pass the independent QuantLib target.
metrics.evidence: OAS is within the established 1.5bp tolerance, while option-adjusted DV01 differs from QuantLib by about 30%.

fixtures.description: QuantLib credit-floater price and parallel-DV01 gaps

metrics.reason: Term-index fixing and value-date conventions require reconciliation with the QuantLib parallel-risk definition.
metrics.evidence: Parallel DV01 differs by about 28%, while CS01 remains within the established 0.5% tolerance.

metrics.reason: Term-index fixing and value-date conventions require reconciliation with the QuantLib floater price.
metrics.evidence: Price differs from QuantLib by about 0.17 per 100 notional, outside the established 0.01 tolerance.

fixtures.description: QuantLib risk-free floater price and parallel-DV01 gaps

metrics.reason: Term-index fixing and value-date conventions require reconciliation with the QuantLib parallel-risk definition.
metrics.evidence: Parallel DV01 differs by about 8%, outside the established 0.5% tolerance.

metrics.reason: Term-index fixing and value-date conventions require reconciliation with the QuantLib floater price.
metrics.evidence: Price differs from QuantLib by about 0.18 per 100 notional, outside the established 0.01 tolerance.

metrics.reason: The old projection of a historical reset was invalid; an independent Bloomberg ASW benchmark refresh is required before changing the external target.
metrics.evidence: Bloomberg ASW is 5.334% with 2bp tolerance; fixing-aware pricing using the required 2026-04-15 SOFR reset produces 5.2667175516%, a 6.73bp gap.

metrics.reason: Preserve the Bloomberg NPV pending an independent HW1F benchmark refresh after the source-backed LongFront and contractual-grid corrections.

metrics.reason: Preserve the Bloomberg vega pending an independent HW1F benchmark refresh after the source-backed LongFront and contractual-grid corrections.

fixtures.description: USD Bloomberg FRA combined-DV01 benchmark gap

metrics.reason: The external target must remain unchanged pending an independent Bloomberg combined-risk definition refresh.
metrics.evidence: The contractual grid restores Bloomberg par rate and zero NPV, but corrected DF-chained semantics produce DV01 -251.608657 versus Bloomberg -337.37 with 0.4 tolerance, an 85.76 gap.
